summary: Stabilization release for the V0.15 Approval Graph and organization/permission refactor.

notes: Permission configuration is persisted through the platform RBAC tables/RPCs.
Employee creation and profile linkage use the canonical employee_profiles table.
employee_profiles_v2 has been folded into employee_profiles; no runtime v2 business tables remain.
Failed employee creation now removes partial business rows before deleting the auth user.
Version display is injected through VITE_APP_VERSION during frontend build.
System management and permission configuration remain under Employee & Organization.
Permission pages support the expanded role set: employee, lead, manager, director, admin.
Timesheet project-block totals include Sunday workdays so block routing totals match daily totals.

deployment.nas: Build image with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.15.1 and tag attendance-module:V0.15.1.
deployment.cloud: Build image with VITE_APP_VERSION=V0.15.1 and tag approval-app:V0.15.1 after NAS validation.

verification: Verify NAS homepage asset contains V0.15.1.
Verify cloud homepage asset contains V0.15.1.
Verify employee login repair path with a known employee account.
